metadata.name: Calculate Carbon Credits from No-Till Farming

description: A farmer who has switched to no-till farming wants to estimate the amount of carbon credits they may be eligible for.

nodes.task_description: Gather data on the farm's acreage, location, soil type, and number of years under no-till practice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all the necessary parameters.

nodes.task_description: Use an approved carbon sequestration model to calculate the estimated tons of CO2 equivalent sequestered per year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the estimated carbon sequestration amount.

nodes.task_description: Provide an estimate of the potential financial value based on current carbon market prices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives an estimated monetary value of the generated credits.
